授業目的: This course examines the complicated relation between "historical" film and history. In particular, it exposes students to ongoing debates regarding Chinese and Japanese movies of WWII.
到達目標: After taking this course students will gain a deeper understanding of the making of "public history" through movies. They will also appreciate the controversies surrounding the making of cinematic "collective memories" of war.

トピック.授業計画1: To be determined in consultation with students. 《1,350minutes》
トピック.授業外学習2: To be determined in consultation with students.

教科書/Required texts0: Readings available in LUNA or free online.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.

name: 【610】History and Film／History and Film
担当者: ツー　ティモシー（TSU TIMOTHY YUN HUI）
